Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Update architecture diagram via draw.io desktop editor

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Implement distributed web crawler with 6 microservices

Java 21 / Spring Boot 3.2 / Kafka-based pipeline:
- Seed URL Controller: REST API for submitting crawl seeds
- URL Frontier: politeness-enforced, disk-backed URL queue
- HTML Downloader (x3): virtual thread downloads with robots.txt
- Link Extractor (x2): Jsoup-based link parsing
- URL Filter: extension/domain/depth filtering
- URL Seen: Bloom filter + PostgreSQL deduplication

Includes Docker Compose (14 containers), Prometheus/Grafana
monitoring, unit tests, README, and draw.io architecture diagram.

commit.message:
v1.7.8: Fix XRPL support — add currency/taxon to attestation conditions

Zod strips unknown keys by default, so agents could not pass currency
or taxon fields through the MCP server. XRPL trust line verification
(RLUSD, USDC) and NFT taxon filtering were silently broken.

Also fixes TokenConfigSchema currency max(3) which rejected "RLUSD"
and "USDC" (4-5 chars).

commit.message:
fix: add dividing line between filters and results in ExercisePicker

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix to_pandas SIGSEGV: route GPU→CPU via Arrow instead of numba_cuda

Root cause identified via step-by-step diagnostics: all 6 GPU ops
complete in <1s, but gdf.to_pandas() → values_host → data_array_view
→ numba_cuda.as_cuda_array → ensure_context → safe_cuda_api_call
→ SIGSEGV. libcudf creates the CUDA context; numba_cuda's context
manager can't access it in a forked process.

Fix: gdf.to_arrow().to_pandas() — libcudf's C++ Arrow interop copies
GPU→CPU with no numba involvement. Warmup extended to exercise the
full round-trip before signalling ready.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Add Docker version auto-detection for dashboard deploys

DOCKER_VERSION file (currently 1) is compared against the deployed
container's DASHBOARD_DOCKER_VERSION env var. When they differ, a full
Docker rebuild is triggered automatically. The --docker flag still
forces a rebuild regardless.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

debug(stitcher): add step-by-step console.log to trace failure point

Adds [stitcher] prefixed logs at every key step:
- FFmpeg load start/success
- Clip fetch success
- silencedetect exit code + parsed duration per clip
- Speech segments detected per clip
- Trim step (segment count + ranges)
- Concat start/done
- Final blob size

Logs [stitcher:hook] FAILED with full error on catch.
Remove once root cause is confirmed.

commit.message:
fix(jenkins): disable Docker cache for frontend build

Docker was caching old config.json.template with wrong field names
(keycloakConfigUrl instead of keycloakUrl), causing login redirect
to localhost:8080. --no-cache ensures fresh template is always used.

commit.message:
Add multi-account Google Drive support

Allows multiple Google accounts to be authenticated simultaneously. Every
Drive tool gains an account_email parameter; when omitted, the persisted
default account is used. Adds list_accounts and switch_account MCP tools,
an add_account.py script for adding accounts via OAuth, and a docker.py
teardown command for clean resets. Setup flow updated to handle
multi-account configuration from a fresh clone.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Implement Phase A: foundation types (Tier 0-1)

- Option[T]: explicit optionality with JSON support
- NonEmpty[T]: guaranteed non-empty collections
- Page[T] + Cursor: cursor-based pagination
- ValidationError types: OutOfRange, InvalidFormat, EmptyRequired, state transition errors
- Constrained numerics: Score [0,1], Weight [-1,1], Activation [0,1], Layer [0,13],
  Cadence [1,∞), Tick [0,∞), Duration [0,∞), FieldPath
- Typed IDs: EventID (UUID v7), ActorID, EdgeID, ConversationID, Hash (SHA-256),
  SystemURI, EnvelopeID, TreatyID, PrimitiveID, EventType, SubscriptionPattern,
  DomainScope, PublicKey (Ed25519), Signature (Ed25519)
- State machines: LifecycleState (6 states, enforced transitions),
  ActorStatus (3 states, Memorial is terminal)
- 91.8% test coverage (above 90% threshold)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

## 周文档 W08 核心内容
- 系统架构升级 (06-NOW.md 迁移、Hook/邮件系统、小红书 MCP)
- 性能优化 (XSD schema 排除，加载提速)

commit.message:
Add trial findings: 4B Q4_K_M agent bench, thread tuning, ctx-size impact

New findings from live benchmarking:
- 4B Q4_K_M outperforms Q8_0 in agent tasks (fewer tool calls, same speed)
- 12 threads optimal on 16-core EPYC: 30% better TG than 16 threads
- ctx-size 16384 saves 672MB vs 65536, sufficient for agent usage
- Update recommended server config: --threads 12 --ctx-size 16384
- 4B completes edit tasks with 2 tool calls vs 2B's 5-9 (better planning)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: install yt-dlp-ejs for YouTube n challenge solving

yt-dlp needs a JavaScript runtime to solve YouTube's n parameter
challenge. Without it, only storyboard images are returned. The
yt-dlp-ejs plugin uses the Node.js already in the container.
